title: pilosella flagellaris subsp. tatrensis
intro: Pilosella flagellaris subsp. tatrensis, also known as Tatrenskaya mouse-ear hawkweed, is a subspecies of flowering plant in the dandelion family. This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating inflammation and fever. The health benefits of Pilosella flagellaris subsp. tatrensis include its ability to reduce pain and discomfort, as well as its potential to stimulate the immune system. Herbal preparations of this plant can be found in the form of teas, tinctures, and infusions, which are often used to alleviate symptoms of various health conditions.
